seo.title: Hire Pre-Vetted Filipino Remote Staff | Pearl Remote
seo.description: Pearl Remote helps businesses hire reliable pre-vetted Filipino virtual assistants, customer support agents, and back-office staff in 3 to 7 days.

heading.prefix: Hire Pre-Vetted Filipino Remote Staff in

hero.description: We help businesses find reliable virtual assistants, customer support agents, and back-office staff from the Philippines.

image.alt: Pearl Remote Filipino remote staff recruitment and onboarding support

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Our streamlined process ensures you get the right talent without the traditional hiring headaches.

steps.title: Tell Us Your Needs
steps.description: We jump on a call to understand your specific requirements, workflow, and culture.

steps.title: We Match Your Staff
steps.description: We filter through our pre-vetted database to find the perfect 3-5 candidates for you.

steps.title: Start in 3-7 Days
steps.description: Interview, select, and onboard your new team member within a single week.

coreServices.heading: Our Core Services
coreServices.description: Dedicated expertise across critical business functions, delivered remotely with precision.

items.title: Customer Support
items.description: 24/7 coverage for ticketing, live chat, and email support with excellent English proficiency.

items.title: Virtual Assistants
items.description: Calendar management, travel booking, and executive-level administrative tasks.

items.title: Admin & Back-Office
items.description: Data entry, invoicing, and complex document processing.

items.title: E-commerce
items.description: Shopify management, order fulfillment, and product listing.

items.title: Social Media
items.description: Content scheduling, community management, and engagement.
